name: Neto POS
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000e7t21EAA.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000e7t21EAA.jpg", "name": "CC-POS.jpg", "embedType": "image", "float": "none", "height": 150, "width": 150}}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "This add-on was built by Maropost"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Add-ons and Integrations built in-house by Maropost are documented and supported by our customer service team. If you're having issues with this integration, "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://www.netohq.com/support/s/ask-us", "target": "_blank", "children": [{"text": "let us know"}]}, {"text": "!"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Please Note", "bold": true}, {"text": ": Neto POS is not available outside of Australia and New Zealand."}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Set up Maropost POS"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Navigate to the "}, {"text": "Addon", "bold": true}, {"text": " store menu. In the Maropost modules section, find the Maropost POS module and click the "}, {"text": "Install", "bold": true}, {"text": " button. Maropost POS is an additional cost."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Check out "}, {"text": "Set up Neto POS"}, {"text": "\u00a0to get started."}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Features"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "PC, Mac, or iPad"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Maropost\u00a0POS works on PC, Mac, and iPad, and syncs to a central database in the cloud. Use any supported device or multiple."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Works Offline"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can sell even when the internet goes down. Maropost POS will automatically sync your sales back to the cloud when you\u2019re back online."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Discounts"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Apply discounts to line items or an entire sale as a % or $ amount."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Line Item Notes"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Add notes to line items to record additional information related to the sale of that item. Notes can appear on receipts."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Customer Accounts"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Create customer accounts to track history and loyalty. Sales taken in Maropost POS will sync with your online customer accounts."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Branded Receipts"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Print receipts for your customers or email them directly."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Serial Tracking"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Add serial tracking to specific products and the system will automatically prompt your staff to enter or scan a serial number at the point of sale."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Park Sales"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Part way through a sale and need to serve another customer in the meantime? Simply park sales for future access at the touch of a button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Integrated Barcode Scanning"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Quickly add items to a sale with USB or Bluetooth barcode scanner support. Store multiple barcodes against a single SKU to support supplier changes."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Product, Customer and Category Search"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Quickly find what you are looking for by keyword or UPC."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Catalogue Your Inventory"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Organise your inventory into an easy to navigate catalogue. Coming soon: Pin popular products to your home page for quick and easy access."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Lightning Quick & Touch Friendly"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Maropost\u00a0POS is fast. Using the latest in user interface technology, we have designed Maropost POS to be responsive to your touch inputs."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Refunds and Returns (coming soon)"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Refund past orders to store credit, or back to the customer using the original payment method."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Reward your customers with loyalty points each time they purchase. Each point has a monetary value, which can be applied to future sales."}]}]}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Payments"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Credit/Debit Cards"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Securely accept credit or debit cards through leading payment processors or your own bank issued terminal. Integrated credit, debit, and Alipay payments with Tyro terminals."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Cash Payments"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Accepting cash is quick and easy. Maropost POS will calculate how much change is due and automatically round transactions where necessary."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Split Payments"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Accept multiple payments using different methods for a single sale."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Gift Certificates"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Issue gift certificates to your customers that can be redeemed against sales."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Layby"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Customers can pay on terms either in store our through your Neto webstore."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Alipay"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Supported Tyro EFTPOS terminals can accept Alipay payments."}]}]}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "For Growing Businesses"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Staff Accounts with PIN control"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Create user accounts for your staff members to track sales, manage permissions and control security. Simple PIN access makes it quick and easy for staff to switch between users."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Multi-Location Management"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Create and control additional locations / outlets from a central control panel. Allocate stock, staff and registers to outlets and run reports on the performance of each separately."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Register/Device Management"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Lock registers to specific hardware devices for complete control over your sales architecture."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Multi-Channel"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Maropost\u00a0POS is part of Neto, an all-in-one commerce platform that allows you to sell online, offline and on eBay from one centralised solution."}]}]}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Data Management"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Centralised in the Cloud"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Your products, customers, staff, sales, reporting and more is all managed in one central online database. Secure and accessible from anywhere, at anytime."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Easy Data Import"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Use our product and customer import templates to bulk import your existing data. If you have an existing POS solution, we can import your products in a few simple steps. Data import tools can also be used to adjust stock, change pricing and re-organise your catalogue in bulk."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Easy Data Export"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Use our data export tools to export all of your data at anytime."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Reports"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Over 40 inbuilt reports including product and sales reports, a real-time dashboard and employee performance reports."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Daily Offsite Backups"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "All your data is automatically backed up daily and stored off-site for added security."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Register Closures"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Create a printable summary of your daily totals per register."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]
